name: Rocky Road Fudge Bars
recipeInstructions:
BROWNIES:
1. Grease and flour a 13x9 inch pan.
2. Melt 1/2 cup butter and 1 square of unsweetened chocolate.
3. Add 1 cup sugar, 1 cup flour, 1/2 cup chopped walnuts, 1 tsp baking powder, 1 tsp vanilla, and 2 eggs to the melted butter and chocolate. Mix well and spread in pan.
4. FILLING:
a. Combine 6 oz cream cheese, 1/2 cup sugar, 2 tbsp flour, 1/4 cup softened butter, 1 egg, and 1 tsp vanilla in a bowl. Beat until smooth and fluffy.
b. Stir in 1/4 cup chopped walnuts.
c. Spread the filling over the chocolate mixture.
d. Sprinkle with chocolate bits.
5. Bake at 350°F (preheated oven) for 25 to 35 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
6. Remove from oven and sprinkle with marshmallow miniatures.
7. Return to oven for an additional 2 minutes.
8. TOPPING:
a. Melt 1/4 cup butter, 1 square of unsweetened chocolate, 2 oz cream cheese, and 1/4 cup milk in a bowl.
b. Stir in 3 cups powdered sugar and 1 tsp vanilla until smooth.
c. Pour the mixture over the bars and swirl with a spoon using an offset spatula or wooden spoon.
9. Allow to cool completely before cutting into bars.
10. Store in refrigerator.
